keyTerms.Unit 7A-3: The fictional designation of the robot narrator, emphasizing its interchangeable, unnamed status
keyTerms.ambient rhythmic noise: The robot's clinical classification of human humming — a data label that fails to capture emotional significance
keyTerms.calibration: The process of adjusting measurement systems to match reference standards; metaphorically, the robot adjusting to the human
keyTerms.value versus measurement: The central theme: machines can measure anything but cannot assign meaning or worth
keyTerms.human-machine collaboration: The emerging paradigm where humans and automated systems complement each other's capabilities rather than compete
